steps.t: You should talk to Rhadrog about Nabatínu's theory that defeating Ombátha may allow the enthralled Jatsakóri to break free.
Rhadrog has asked you to scout Kôth Rau, the Ordâkhai stronghold in south-central An Shêru.
You have come to Kôth Rau to scout out the situation at the Ordâkhai stronghold and found them flying the banners of Sauron, called Barkhûsh in this p…
As you destroyed banners of Barkhûsh at Kôth Rau, you noticed that they are holding prisoners here. You should assess the situation with the prisoners…
As you got closer to some of the prisoners, a shiny glint of something metal on the ground caught your eye. You should pick it up.
You have done what you can for the moment at Kôth Rau. You should return to Gadim-ûn and discuss what you found with Nabatínu.
